question: Will the weekly number of initial unemployment claims have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-06-08?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/ICSA once the data is published.

The exact value on 2025-06-08 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-05-29) was 227000.000. (The latest value released in Initial Claims from the release Unemployment Insurance Weekly Claims Report.)
background: The notes from the release: N/A.  The notes from the series: An initial claim is a claim filed by an unemployed individual after a separation from an employer. The claim requests a determination of basic eligibility for the Unemployment Insurance program..  Additional background of the series:  1. the units of the series: Number.  2. the seasonal adjustments of the series:  Seasonally Adjusted  3. the update frequency: Weekly, Ending Saturday
